reason: Browser-use feature test: Agent successfully opened browser, navigated to example.com, retrieved page title, and returned response mentioning "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded Gamut application with agent list visible
Found and clicked on "QA-20260626-194759-e7wq" agent in the sidebar — Successfully opened the agent interface with chat view and input field
Typed and sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Successfully submitted message; agent transitioned to "working" status
Waited up to 3 minutes for agent response — Agent completed task in 17 seconds (well within timeout)
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states: "The page title is "Example Domain"." and "The page at https://example.com loaded with the heading "Example Domain"."
